message:
feat(huh): Add validation framework conformance tests

- Add validator helper functions to huh crate:
  - validate_required_name(): Required field validator
  - validate_min_length_8(): Minimum length validator (8 chars)
  - validate_email(): Email format validator

- Implement validation conformance tests matching Go huh behavior:
  - validation_required: empty/whitespace errors, valid text passes
  - validation_min_length: short strings error, long enough passes
  - validation_email: empty/invalid errors, valid emails pass

- Update conformance test documentation to reflect new validation support

Test results: 38 passed, 0 failed, 8 skipped (3 validation tests now pass)

Closes: charmed_rust-5x5.9.4

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
